verses.text: When God would heal Israel, Ephraim's iniquity was exposed; they make the king glad with their wickedness. Sin uncovered. The attempt at healing only reveals how deep the disease runs.
When God would heal Israel, Ephraim's iniquity was exposed; they make the king glad with their wickedness. Sin uncovered. The attempt at healing only reveals how deep the disease runs.
When God would heal Israel, Ephraim's iniquity was exposed; they make the king glad with their wickedness. Sin uncovered. The attempt at healing only reveals how deep the disease runs.
They are all adulterers, hearts hot as a baker's oven; their kings fall, and 'there is none among them that calleth unto me.' Burning passions. Inflamed by sin, they never turn to God.

They are all adulterers, hearts hot as a baker's oven; their kings fall, and 'there is none among them that calleth unto me.' Burning passions. Inflamed by sin, they never turn to God.
Ephraim has mixed with the nations; he is 'a cake not turned,' half-baked; strangers sap his strength unawares. Compromise. Mingling with the world has left him weak and self-deceived.

Ephraim is 'like a silly dove without heart,' calling now to Egypt, now to Assyria; woe, for they have fled from God. Foolish flitting. They seek help everywhere but from the Lord.

Ephraim is 'like a silly dove without heart,' calling now to Egypt, now to Assyria; woe, for they have fled from God. Foolish flitting. They seek help everywhere but from the Lord.
They howled for corn and wine, not from the heart; they return, 'but not to the most High,' like 'a deceitful bow.' Empty repentance. A turning that is not toward God misses the mark entirely.
